approaches.title: Single-pass Roman numeral accumulation
approaches.summary: Iterates through the Roman numeral characters, maps each symbol to its value, and adjusts the running total when a larger value follows a smaller one.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Initial implementation using a HashMap for Roman symbol lookup and a single-pass subtraction adjustment.
Replaced the HashMap with an idiomatic Rust match closure while preserving the same single-pass algorithm.
Replaced char_indices with chars because byte indices are unnecessary, preserving the same algorithm.
